# Zapply Jobs — Internships 2027

> Curated internship listings for students — software engineering, data science, hardware, AI, business, and more. Updated every 15 minutes. US-focused.

## What this repo provides
- 3,000+ internship listings updated every 15 minutes
- Summer, fall, spring, and co-op programs
- Jobs from 500+ companies across 9 ATS platforms
- Structured data: title, company, location, apply URL, domain tags
- US-only internships

## How to use this data
- Browse the README table for quick listings
- Use `.github/data/current_jobs.json` for programmatic access
- Apply links go directly to company career pages

## Related repos
- New Grad Jobs: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Jobs-2026
- Software Engineering: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Software-Engineering-Jobs-2026
- Data Science: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Data-Science-Jobs-2026

## Who maintains this
Zapply Jobs (zapplyjobs) — automated pipeline with human curation
